name: EBM Python Memory Engine
description: Evidence-Backed Memory (Python) — three-plane memory architecture with HTTP sidecar proxy to ebm_context_engine engine

mode.label: Mode
mode.help: local = spawn Python sidecar; remote = connect to an existing EBM server

pythonCommand.label: Python Command
pythonCommand.help: Python 3.12+ executable path for local mode

baseUrl.label: Remote Base URL
baseUrl.help: Remote EBM server base URL for remote mode

ebmPyPath.label: EBM Path
ebmPyPath.help: Workspace root containing ebm_context_engine/ and ebm/config.json

mode.description: local = spawn Python sidecar; remote = use existing HTTP server

port.description: Local sidecar HTTP port (local mode only)

baseUrl.description: API base URL (remote mode). Supports ${ENV} expansion. Default: http://127.0.0.1:18790

ebmPyPath.description: ebm_context_engine project root directory (contains ebm_context_engine/ package). Supports ~ and ${ENV}

healthTimeoutMs.description: Health check timeout during startup in milliseconds

portScanRange.description: Max port scan range when preferred port is occupied
